## TRM1.2. Additional time in taxi-in phase (PI#5) {#trm1.2.-additional-time-in-taxi-in-phase-pi5 .Heading-2-TZ}

Six Spanish airports are subject to the monitoring of this indicator: Madrid -- Barajas, Barcelona, Palma de Mallorca, Málaga, Gran Canaria and Alicante.

The additional time in 2025 was equal to 2.19 min/arr in Madrid, 1.13 min/arr in Barcelona, 1.28 min/arr in Palma, 1.46 min/arr in Málaga, 1.12 min/arr in Gran Canaria and 1.27 min/arr in Alicante.

The average for RP4 airports subject to monitoring of this indicator across Member States in 2025 was 1.79 min/arr.
